body:
The initialization of the mean in UKI need not be the prior mean. In some situations, we may want to reconstruct the EnsembleKalmanProcess after every iteration, conserving the same prior. The current constructor did not allow this; it selected the current mean as the prior mean. This PR decouples the two, without changing the default behavior of the system.

In addition, comments and typing are improved for the module.
title: Decouple initial conditions in UKI from prior for regularization.
